title: Group Settings
subtitle: Manage your group's general configuration and access-sensitive details.

general.title: General Settings
general.subtitle: Update the mutable details that define how your group appears and how members join it.
general.owner_only_notice: Only group owners can update these settings. Moderators can review them here.

visibility_summary.public_visible: {name} can be joined by anyone and will show up in search and profiles.
visibility_summary.public_hidden: {name} can be joined by anyone, but it will not show up in discovery or searchable profiles.
visibility_summary.private_visible: {name} can only be joined via invite, but it will still show up in search and profiles.
visibility_summary.private_hidden: {name} can only be joined via invite and will stay hidden from discovery and searchable profiles.

description.placeholder: Tell people what your group focuses on and who it is for.

profile_picture.help: Optional. Upload a new image to replace the current group picture.
profile_picture.preview_help: This preview shows the centered square crop that will be resized and used as your group's profile image.

discord_invite_url.help: Optional. Add a Discord invite so members can easily join your server.

is_public.label: Public Group
is_public.help: Anyone can join public groups, and public-facing future runs can be seen by outsiders.

is_visible.label: Visible in Discovery
is_visible.help: Visible groups can appear in discovery and search, even if they are private.

invites.title: Invite Links
invites.subtitle: Manage invite links for new members.
invites.empty: No invite links have been created yet.

create_modal.title: Create Invite Link
create_modal.subtitle: Set optional limits for uses and expiry. Leave fields empty to keep the invite open-ended.

ownership.title: Ownership
ownership.subtitle: Transfer ownership to another existing member when you need to hand the group over.
ownership.owner_only_notice: Only the current owner can transfer ownership.
ownership.warning_title: Transfering ownership is a high-impact action.
ownership.warning_description: Once transferred, you will lose owner rights and become a moderator in the group.
ownership.empty: You need at least one other member in the group before ownership can be transferred.

confirm_modal.title: Transfer Ownership
confirm_modal.subtitle: Choose the member who should become the new owner, then confirm the transfer.
confirm_modal.warning: This action cannot be undone from this flow. You will immediately become a moderator.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.subtitle: Delete the group permanently if you are absolutely sure it should be removed.
danger_zone.owner_only_notice: Only the current owner can delete this group.
danger_zone.warning_description: Deleting the group will permanently remove its settings, invites, memberships, and scheduled runs.

confirm_modal.title: Delete Group
confirm_modal.subtitle: This will permanently delete {name}. Please confirm that you want to continue.
confirm_modal.warning: Once deleted, this group and all of its related data will be gone forever.
